name: django-music-publisher

metadata.name: django-music-publisher
metadata.summary: Software for managing music metadata, batch registration of musical works, royalty processing and data exchange.

documentation:
# Django-Music-Publisher - Free music publishing software

```{image} https://github.com/matijakolaric-com/django-music-publisher/workflows/build/badge.svg?branch=master&logo=pypi&logoColor=white
:alt: Build Status
:target: https://github.com/matijakolaric-com/django-music-publisher/actions/workflows/build.yml
```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/github/issues/matijakolaric-com/django-music-publisher/bug?logo=github&logoColor=white
:alt: GitHub issues

```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/readthedocs/django-music-publisher?logo=read-the-docs&logoColor=white
:alt: Documentation Status
:target: https://django-music-publisher.readthedocs.io/en/latest/
```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/coveralls/github/matijakolaric-com/django-music-publisher/master?logo=coveralls&branch=master&logoColor=white
:alt: Coverage Status
:target: https://coveralls.io/github/matijakolaric-com/django-music-publisher?branch=master
```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/badge/code%20style-black-000000.svg
:alt: Code Style
:target: https://github.com/psf/black
```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/django-music-publisher.svg?logo=pypi&logoColor=white
:alt: PYPI

```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/pypi/wheel/django-music-publisher?logo=pypi&logoColor=white
:alt: PyPI - Wheel
:target: https://pypi.org/project/django-music-publisher/
```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/pypi/status/django-music-publisher?logo=pypi&logoColor=white
:alt: PyPI - Status
:target: https://pypi.org/project/django-music-publisher/
```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/pypi/djversions/django-music-publisher?logo=pypi&logoColor=white
:alt: PyPI - Django Version
:target: https://pypi.org/project/django-music-publisher/
```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/django-music-publisher?logo=pypi&logoColor=white
:alt: PyPI - Python Version
:target: https://pypi.org/project/django-music-publisher/
```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/github/license/matijakolaric-com/django-music-publisher.svg?logo=github&logoColor=white
:alt: License
:target: https://github.com/matijakolaric-com/django-music-publisher/blob/master/LICENSE
```

Django-Music-Publisher (DMP) is open source software for **managing music metadata**, **registration/licencing of musical works**, **royalty management** and **music data distribution**.

```{image} docs/images/work.png
```

- Home: <https://dmp.matijakolaric.com/>
- Docs: <https://django-music-publisher.readthedocs.io/>
- Code: <https://github.com/matijakolaric-com/django-music-publisher/>
- PYPI: <https://pypi.org/project/django-music-publisher/>

modules.name: music_publisher.validators
documentation:
CWR-compatibility field-level validation.

For formats that allow dashes and dots (ISWC, IPI Base), the actual format is
from CWR 2.x specification: ISWC without and IPI Base with dashes.

functions.name: music_publisher.validators.check_ean_digit
documentation:
EAN checksum validation.

Args:
    ean (str): EAN

Raises:
    ValidationError

functions.name: music_publisher.validators.check_iswc_digit
documentation:
ISWC / IPI Base checksum validation.

Args:
    iswc (str): ISWC or IPI Base #
    weight (int): 1 for ISWC, 2 for IPI Base #

Raises:
    ValidationError

functions.name: music_publisher.validators.check_ipi_digit
documentation:
IPI Name checksum validation.

Args:
    all_digits (str): IPI Name #

Raises:
    ValidationError

functions.name: music_publisher.validators.check_isni_digit
documentation:
ISNI checksum validation.

Args:
    all_digits (str): ISNI

Raises:
    ValidationError

functions.name: music_publisher.validators.check_dpid
documentation: Calculate the checksum. A valid number should have a checksum of 1.

functions.name: music_publisher.validators.validate_publisher_settings
documentation: CWR-compliance validation for publisher settings.

functions.name: music_publisher.validators.validate_settings
documentation:
CWR-compliance validation for settings.

This is used to prevent deployment with invalid settings.

documentation:
Initialize the validator.

Args:

documentation:
Use custom validation, based on the name of the field.

Args:
    value (): Input value

Raises:
    ValidationError: If the value does not pass the validation.

Validate fields for CWR compliance.

Attributes:
    field (str): Validation service name of the field being validated

modules.name: music_publisher.data_import
documentation:
All the code related to importing data from external files.

Currently, only works (with writers, artists, library data and ISRCs) are
imported. (ISRCs will be used for importing recording data the in future.)

modules.name: music_publisher.tests
documentation:
Tests for {mod}`music_publisher`.

The folder includes these files:

- CW200001DMP_000.V21 - CWR 2.1 registration file
- CW200002DMP_0000_V3-0-0.SUB - CWR 3.0 registration file
- CW200003DMP_0000_V3-0-0.ISR - CWR3.0 ISWC request file
- CW200001052_DMP.V21 - CWR 2.1 acknowledgement file
- dataimport.csv - used for data imports
- royaltystatement.csv - CSV royalty statement
- royaltystatement_200k_rows.csv - CSV royalty statement with 200.000 rows,
  used for load testing.

Actual tests are in {mod}`music_publisher.tests.tests`.

modules.name: music_publisher
documentation:
Django-Music-Publisher (DMP) is open source software for managing music
metadata, registration/licencing of musical works and royalty processing.

{mod}`music_publisher` app is the only Django app in this project.

classes.name: music_publisher.api.DjangoModelPermissionsIncludingView
documentation: Requires the user to have proper permissions, including view.

classes.name: music_publisher.api.ReleaseViewSet
documentation:
API endpoint for releases with images or descriptions.

Requires authenticated user with appropriate `view` permission.

Note that all related information, including files are included in
this view.

classes.name: music_publisher.api.ArtistViewSet
documentation:
API endpoint for artists with images or descriptions.

Requires authenticated user with appropriate `view` permission.

Note that all related information, including files are included in
this view.

classes.name: music_publisher.api.PlaylistViewSet
documentation:
Endpoint for retrieval of playlists, using secret URL.
You can find the URL in the playlist `change view`.

classes.name: music_publisher.api.IsSuperuser
documentation: Allows access only to authenticated superusers.

classes.name: music_publisher.api.BackupViewSet
documentation: Creates a large json file with all works and all related metadata.

Create a data structure that can be serialized as JSON.

Normalize the structure if required.

Concrete class, with references to foreign objects.

Attributes:

: \_work_id (django.db.models.CharField): permanent work id, either imported or fixed when exports are created
  iswc (django.db.models.CharField): ISWC
  original_title (django.db.models.CharField): title of the original work, implies modified work
  release_label (django.db.models.ForeignKey): Foreign key to {class}`.models.LibraryRelease`
  last_change (django.db.models.DateTimeField):

  > when the last change was made to this object or any of the child
  > objects, basically used in filtering

  artists (django.db.models.ManyToManyField):

  : Artists performing the work

  writers (django.db.models.ManyToManyField):

  : Writers who created the work

  objects (WorkManager): Database Manager

Make sure that controlled writers have all the required data.

Also check that writers that are not controlled do not have data
that can not apply to them.

methods.name: music_publisher.models.WriterInWork.get_agreement_dict
documentation: Get agreement dictionary for this writer in work.

methods.name: music_publisher.models.WriterInWork.get_dict
documentation:
Create a data structure that can be serialized as JSON.

Returns:
    dict: JSON-serializable data structure

Writers who created this work.

At least one writer in work must be controlled.
Sum of relative shares must be (roughly) 100%.
Capacity is limited to roles for original writers.

Attributes:

: work (django.db.models.ForeignKey): FK to Work
  writer (django.db.models.ForeignKey): FK to Writer
  saan (django.db.models.CharField): Society-assigned agreement number

  > between the writer and the original publisher, please note that
  > this field is for SPECIFIC agreements, for a general agreement,
  > use {attr}`.base.IPIBase.saan`

  controlled (django.db.models.BooleanField): A complete mistery field
  relative_share (django.db.models.DecimalField): Initial split among

  > writers, prior to publishing

  capacity (django.db.models.CharField): Role of the writer in this work
  publisher_fee (django.db.models.DecimalField): Percentage of royalties

  > kept by publisher

methods.name: music_publisher.models.CWRExport.create_cwr
documentation: Create CWR and save.

Export in CWR format.

Common Works Registration format is a standard format for registration of
musical works world-wide. Exports are available in CWR 2.1 revision 8 and
CWR 3.0 (experimental).

Attributes:
    nwr_rev (django.db.models.CharField): choice field where user can
        select which version and type of CWR it is
    cwr (django.db.models.TextField): contents of CWR file
    year (django.db.models.CharField): 2-digit year format
    num_in_year (django.db.models.PositiveSmallIntegerField):         CWR sequential number in a year
    works (django.db.models.ManyToManyField): included works
    description (django.db.models.CharField): internal note

classes.name: music_publisher.urls.APIRootView
documentation:
Root of the REST API

Endpoints `artists` and `releases` give access to artists and releases
with public data (`image` or `description`), related
objects and *all* files, including images and audio files.

Endpoint `artists` requires authentication and `view_artist`
permission. Endpoint `releases` requires authentication and
`view_releases` permission.

Endpoint `backup_metadata` creates JSON with all works, all releases and
all related metadata, but not public data (descriptions, images, audio).
This file is usually huge, so browsable API is not available. Requires
authentication and `superuser` privileges.

modules.name: music_publisher.tests.tests
documentation:
Tests for {mod}`music_publisher`.

This software has almost full test coverage. The only exceptions are
instances of {class}`Exception` being caught during data imports.
(User idiocy is boundless.)

Most of the tests are functional end-to-end tests. While they test that
code works, they don't always test that it works as expected.

Still, it must be noted that exports are tested against provided
templates (made in a different software, not using the same code beyond
Python standard library).

More precise tests would be better.

methods.name: music_publisher.tests.tests.AdminTest.test_data_import_and_royalty_calculations
documentation:
Test data import, ack import and royalty calculations.

This is the normal process, work data is entered, then the registration
follows and then it can be processed in royalty statements.

This test also includes load testing, 200.000 rows must be imported
in under 10-15 seconds, performed 4 times with different algos and
ID types.

modules.name: music_publisher.royalty_calculation
documentation:
This module is about processing royalty statements.

It processes files in the request-response cycle, not in background workers.
Therefore, focus is on speed. Nothing is written to the database, and
SELECTs are optimised and performed in one batch.

documentation: Yield choices, fixed and societies.

Yield fixed options.

They will be extended with columns in JS and prior to validation.
